task_name: Infrastructure provisioning (Upstash Redis + Vercel + env vars)
notes: Vercel project linked successfully (cpr-first-aid / risedials-projects). Upstash MCP was unavailable in this session; Vercel KV is deprecated in CLI v43+. infra-notes.md contains step-by-step instructions for the user to create a free Upstash database and add env vars via 'vercel env add'. All downstream code (api/sync.ts) is written to use UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL and UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN as env vars — once those are set, the sync endpoint will work without any code changes.
issues_encountered: Upstash MCP not available in Claude Code tool list
Vercel KV deprecated in CLI v43 — 'vercel storage' command not recognized
Fallback: user must create free Upstash database manually (documented in infra-notes.md)
